finding_results.notes: The chapter no longer relies on em-dashes as default connective tissue. Opening exposition, Marcus's floor walk, the offer scene, Priya's follow-up, Dani's break-room confrontation, and the closing text exchange now read through periods, commas, and colons. Only one em-dash remains, in Nick's fractured spoken reaction at the offer.
finding_results.summary: Reduced Chapter 10's em-dash usage to a single live line while preserving the chapter's planned engine: Marcus offers Nick calibration access, Dani is passed over, and Nick accepts with full awareness of the cost to her.
